differential_diagnoses: Disseminated Fungal Infection (e.g., Candida albicans or Aspergillus fumigatus)
next_steps: Perform transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) to exclude infective endocarditis
Obtain vitreous fluid aspiration for culture, PCR, and cytology
Perform CT-guided percutaneous biopsy of lung nodules and/or the hepatic mass for microbiological and histopathological assessment
Order comprehensive infectious workup: serum beta-D-glucan, galactomannan, HIV testing, and blood cultures for slow-growing/fastidious organisms including Burkholderia
Involve ophthalmology for urgent evaluation and potential vitrectomy for source control and diagnosis
Discontinue empirical steroids; maintain broad-spectrum antimicrobial coverage pending specific culture results
